body_preview: - Day 138 assessment agent exited 0 with no provider error but did not write assessment.md. The harness guard wrote session_plan/assessment_missing.md with only basic fields (exit_code, timeout, provider_error, transcript). - The seeded task_01.md generated by choose_task() has Files="scripts/preseed_session_plan.py" — a self-referential fallback that tells
expected_evidence: Next session with missing assessment + trajectory gnomes produces a task_01.md whose Files includes src/*.rs and whose Evidence includes trajectory gnome data. task_obsolete_count decreases (fewer self-referential tasks selected). Implementation sessions produce code changes in actual source files instead of script-only edits. Implementation Notes: The chang
title: Fix assessment silent failure fallback: use trajectory gnomes to pick actual code targets
